title: Ventures.
content:
Finite to fail, but infinite to venture.
    For the one ship that struts the shore
    Many's the gallant, overwhelmed creature
    Nodding in navies nevermore.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "Ventures."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
